item.title: fried_egg_golf: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 1min Public registration for our September event at Kingsley Club and Belvedere is now
item.description:
Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 1min Public registration for our September event at Kingsley Club and Belvedere is now open!
We'll see you there. De thefriedegg.com 1 290

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 23min LIV's media availability that was canceled yesterday due to power issues at the g
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 23min LIV's media availability that was canceled yesterday due to power issues at the golf course is happening now 2 6 54 5 mil

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 4min En respuesta a @JoshACarpenter First half of this was in Spanish, and I am not bi
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 4min En respuesta a @JoshACarpenter First half of this was in Spanish, and I am not bilingual. Second half was all competition-based questions 2 2 457

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 11min #UPDATE — Golf Channel’s @RichLernerGC reports that LIV players are “awaiting their fat
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 11min #UPDATE — Golf Channel’s @RichLernerGC reports that LIV players are “awaiting their fate” and may learn more this afternoon. Tee times have been released for LIV Mexico as reports emerge that operations are “business as usual” so far today, following a report that LIV Mostrar más 4 9 106 11 mil

item.title: AlanShipnuck: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 17min Gerald Feierstein, a former US ambassador to Yemen and director of the Middle East I
item.description: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 17min Gerald Feierstein, a former US ambassador to Yemen and director of the Middle East Institute: "The Saudis can be extremely cold blooded when it comes down to it. If it looks to them like LIV Golf is becoming an albatross, they won’t have any qualms about walking away from it." 9 3 69 7 mil

item.title: AlanShipnuck: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 16min En respuesta a @AlanShipnuck From: De amazon.com 5 3 mil
item.description: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 16min En respuesta a @AlanShipnuck From: De amazon.com 5 3 mil
